concept_hook: Seductive Brazilian viper who paralyzes foes with toxin-laced kisses and clawing embraces.
narrative_role: calculating temptress who exploits lust and overconfidence

concept_hook: Haitian voodoo witch who torments enemies by piercing spirit-bound dolls during combat.
narrative_role: mysterious ritualist haunted by the spirits she summons
media_archetype_inspiration: Marie Laveau as in American Horror Story: Coven

concept_hook: British gymnast prodigy who evades and submits larger foes with flawless aerial technique.
narrative_role: eager underdog prodigy winning hearts and submissions

concept_hook: Italian fashion doll assassin striking with bladed heels and razor-edged accessories.
narrative_role: narcissistic diva demanding the runway spotlight
media_archetype_inspiration: Gazelle from Kingsman: The Golden Circle

concept_hook: Australian outback huntress snaring prey with boomerangs, nets, and unerring tracking.
narrative_role: rugged survivor with a grudge against urban elites
media_archetype_inspiration: Imperator Furiosa from Mad Max: Fury Road

concept_hook: Chinese empress wielding psychic chi commands to debuff and dismantle wills.
narrative_role: imperious tactician concealing deep personal loss
media_archetype_inspiration: Azula from Avatar: The Last Airbender

concept_hook: French siren singer whose enchanted melodies induce trance before lethal lashes.
narrative_role: sultry showwoman thriving on adoration and agony
media_archetype_inspiration: Diva Plavalaguna from The Fifth Element

concept_hook: German lab-engineered feline who slashes and leaps with predatory hyper-agility.
narrative_role: tormented escapee grappling with her beastly instincts
